sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32197" key="e)/kklusma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκ-κλυσμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n32197.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which is washed away,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ τῆς ἡδονῆς ἔ.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1089b</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> ; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which is washed up, produce of the sea,</tr_> of purple dye, Zos.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.164</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="B" id="n32197.1" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκ-κλυστέον</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must wash out,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:89" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.89</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
